title: Module 1
content:
General introduction to core cavity design, parting surface, sprue, sprue
pullers, mould cooling, Ejection system, mould daylight
Feed system design, cooling system and Ejection system design for Injection
moulds, split, under cuts, side core threads. Runnerless, hot and cold runne
rmoulds, working of various ejection actuators, cooling of insert moulds, types
and features.

title: Module 2
content:
Extrusion die design, flow through a die, die land, die body, straight through
die, Cross head, Offset die design, Coat hanger, fishtail, annular, pipe die
design, wire coating die, cold feed and hot feed die design.

title: Module 3
content:
Mould materials, Nitriding steels, case hardened steels, corrosion resistant
steels, through hardened steels, maraging steels, hard material alloys, steel
castings, physical properties, Aluminium mould making
Electro forming, EDM, Hobbing, polishing, surface structuring, hard chrome
plating, chemical and physical vapour deposition.

title: Module 4
content:
CAM mould making, EDP systems, Data preparation for machining,
Machining process, steps involved
Standard components of a mould base, Standards for gate area, standards for
ejection, standards for mould heating, Mould maintenance, Servicing and
Inspection, Repairs, Storage.
